headline: Tyler Technologies Named a "Strong Performer" in an Industry Cloud Solutions For Public Sector Analyst Evaluation
summary: PLANO, Texas, March 17, 2026--Tyler Technologies has been positioned as a Strong Performer in The Forrester Wave™: Industry Cloud Solutions For Public Sector, Q1 2026.

headline: Is Tyler Technologies Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: While Tyler Technologies has trailed the broader S&P 500 Index over the past year, analysts remain highly bullish about its future prospects.
